name_cn:
CLUNY Mini Series | CODE:M46055
▪️Size: 20*16*7.5cm▪️
The new Cluny Mini is here, another highly anticipated bestseller.
The iconic Monogram design is paired with a super gentle milk tea-colored shoulder strap. Casual yet sweet and refined, this low-key and practical design is perfect for going out or commuting. A very minimalist yet stylish look. I believe this will be another massive hit!
